EmailTemplate.name: Experience Cloud: Welcome to FIMBY
EmailTemplate.subject: Welcome to the family in your backyard
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Come on in.
Welcome to the family in your backyard
Hi {!Receiving_User.FirstName},
For years I've been dreaming about this — a simple way to help neighbours know and care for each other, rooted in the belief that a more beautiful world is possible when we treat each other with love and generosity.
That dream is FIMBY, and you're now part of it.
This is a grand experiment in neighbouring. We're building something together — a place where we look out for each other, share what we have, and show up when it matters. Not perfectly. But together.
Welcome to the family in your backyard.
Use the link below to set your password and come on in. This link is for you only and expires after a short time.
Come on in: {!Community_Url}
Your username: {!Receiving_User.Username}
With love, Stephen Rathjen Founder, FIMBY
Family In My Backyard · Our approach: https://fimby.com/our-approach/
